title: Feature flag registry
description: Schema for feature-flags.json — read by scripts/detect-dead-flags.ts.

_comment.description: Free-form documentation. Ignored by the detector.

name.description: Lowercase snake_case flag name, matches the string passed to isFlagEnabled/percentageRollout/flagValue.

kind.description: boolean -> isFlagEnabled (FF_<NAME>); rollout -> percentageRollout (FF_<NAME>_PCT); variant -> flagValue (FF_<NAME>).

owner.description: GitHub login or team handle responsible for the flag's lifecycle.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the flag was added.

maxAgeDays.description: Optional. Override the default 90-day staleness window.

cleanup.description: Free-form note describing the condition under which this flag should be removed.

description.description: What this flag controls in plain English.
